detail.description:
Log in right now to receive a 🔥package worth 100,000 KRW!

100% guaranteed special title, 100 million silver coins 💰, and a growth package!

One Overlord!

Fierce ambition and love vying for a single throne

And countless strategies and betrayals unfolding in a tense atmosphere

Who will become the master of the Red Overlord Castle?

Their story, which shakes the world,

begins now.

A special gift presented only to the Overlord who orders to 'embark in the Jianghu'!

[Peak Overlord] The Peak
detail.recentChanges: 한국 IP 1억뷰의 신화! 접속 시 1만 뽑기 즉시 지급!
